fixes_applied.original_issue: Five LazyLock<Regex> statics (RUST_USE_RE, JS_IMPORT_RE, JS_REQUIRE_RE, PY_IMPORT_RE, PY_FROM_RE) had no regexes_compile() test — a malformed pattern would panic at runtime rather than at test time
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added regexes_compile() test in the existing #[cfg(test)] module that force-evaluates all five LazyLock<Regex> statics by dereferencing them. Pattern: `let _ = &*RUST_USE_RE;` for each static.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Two function-local LazyLock<Regex> statics (RESULT_RE, TAG_RE inside parse_duckduckgo_results) had no compile-time test coverage. These use .expect() which is better than .unwrap() but still lacks a test that catches regressions.
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added regexes_compile() test that calls parse_duckduckgo_results with an empty string, driving both function-local statics through their LazyLock::new closures. If either regex is malformed the test panics immediately.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Three fire-and-forget tokio::spawn calls (set_thinking_level, cycle_thinking, set_mode) swallowed task panics silently — if the spawned future panicked the error was lost with no logging.
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added `use tracing::warn;` import. Refactored all three spawn sites to capture the JoinHandle and spawn a second lightweight task that awaits the handle and calls `warn!` if the task panicked. This surfaces panics at minimum as tracing::warn! messages rather than silent loss. Full error propagation to TUI AppEvent is deferred (requires AgentStack method signature changes and AppEvent::Error routing).

fixes_applied.original_issue: Codebase index JoinHandle from tokio::spawn at line ~141 is dropped immediately — if the task panicked internally the error was silently lost. The spawn already logs Ok/Err via info!/warn! macros inside the async block, so runtime errors ARE surfaced. The only gap is task panics (JoinError::is_panic).
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred. Adding a JoinHandle field to AgentStack requires a structural change: AgentStack is constructed in AgentStack::new() before it is fully assembled, and the codebase_index Arc<RwLock<...>> is the communication channel already in place. The spawn already handles both Ok and Err branches with info!/warn!. Full JoinHandle storage would need a new RwLock<Option<JoinHandle<()>>> field, proper Send bounds verification, and poll-before-codebase_search logic — this is an architectural change beyond the scope of a safe r4 fix.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Structural change to AgentStack (new JoinHandle field + poll-before-use logic) required. The existing warn! on Err already surfaces the most common failure path. Only task panics (extremely rare for a pure async indexer) would be missed.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Audit for remaining production eprintln!/println!/dbg! calls that should be converted to tracing.
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Audited all 32 files. Findings: (1) main.rs — all eprintlns are legitimate pre-logging-init CLI messages (trust confirmation, feature flag errors, benchmark suite warnings). (2) auth.rs — all printlns are intentional interactive CLI user-facing output. (3) headless/*.rs — all eprintlns are intentional headless-mode progress output to stderr. (4) plugin_commands.rs — all printlns are intentional ava plugin subcommand output. (5) benchmark*.rs, review.rs — intentional progress/results output. No inappropriate debug prints found. No changes needed.

summary: Round 4: 3 fixes applied, 1 deferred. Added regexes_compile() tests for ava-codebase indexer.rs (5 LazyLock<Regex> statics: RUST_USE_RE, JS_IMPORT_RE, JS_REQUIRE_RE, PY_IMPORT_RE, PY_FROM_RE) and ava-tools web_search.rs (2 function-local statics via parse_duckduckgo_results). Improved fire-and-forget spawn error surfacing in ava-tui/state/agent.rs — all three spawn sites (set_thinking_level, cycle_thinking, set_mode) now capture JoinHandle and log panics via tracing::warn!. Production eprintln/println audit confirmed all 32 flagged files use intentional CLI output (not debug artifacts) — no changes needed. Codebase JoinHandle deferred as structural AgentStack change. Test count: 1767 → 1769. cargo check: clean. cargo test: 0 failures.
